stories.title: Takeaways: Spurs close out Timberwolves
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned from the Wolves-Spurs series.

stories.title: Spurs oust Wolves in rout, set up clash with OKC
stories.summary: Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper accounted for nearly half of the Spurs' scoring in a series-clinching 139-109 win over the Timberwolves to set up a Western Conference finals clash with the Thunder.

stories.title: Clark proud of 3-point breakthrough in OT loss
stories.summary: Fever star Caitlin Clark took three quarters to find her groove before carrying Indiana into overtime with a score-tying triple with 3.1 seconds left in regulation.

stories.title: Pistons' huge 2nd half buries Cavs, forces Game 7
stories.summary: The Pistons won their fourth elimination game in the 2026 NBA playoffs, beating the Cavaliers to force a Game 7.

stories.title: Schwarber ups HR total to 20 as Phils win wild one...
stories.summary: Kyle Schwarber can't really explain why he's on a tear right now. "It's a great question," the Phillies slugger said after smashing a pair of two-run homers -- boosting his season total to 20 -- during an 11-9, 10-inning victory over the Pirates.
